meta.title: Commissioner Michael O'Rielly Discusses Telecommunications P
meta.description:
Recently confirmed Commissioner Michael O'Rielly of the Federal Communications Commission will make one of his first public speeches on telecommunications policy at the Hudson Institute.
He was nominated for a seat on the Federal Communications Commission by President Barack Obama on August 1, 2013 and was confirmed unanimously by the United States Senate.
Prior to joining the FCC, Commissioner O'Rielly served as a Policy Advisor in the Office of the Senate Republican Whip, led by U.S. Senator
